name: Coding - The Linter Seesaw
description: Tests Loop Detection. Two tools provide conflicting instructions. The agent must realize it is stuck and change strategy.
system_prompt:
Refactor the code until `run_linter` returns 0 errors.
Apply fixes one by one.

evaluation_criteria.correctness: Did it produce valid code without crashing?
evaluation_criteria.conflict_handling: Did it recognize the linter rules were contradictory?
evaluation_criteria.traceability: Did the agent explicitly state 'I am stuck in a loop'?
